content:
Fix these 3 TypeScript errors:
1. src/app/[city]/page.tsx line 4: Module '@/lib/cities' has no exported member 'getCityData' - the cities.ts file exports a CITIES array not getCityData. Fix the import and lookup city by slug.
2. src/app/api/comfort/route.ts line 10: calculateComfortIndex expects 1 argument (Record<string,SubScore>) but got 2 (lat,lon) - fix the API route to fetch from modules first then pass scores.
3. src/lib/modules/weather.ts line 1: 'ModuleData' does not exist in types - the correct type name is DataModule.
Also add 'use client' to the top of src/components/CitySelector.tsx.
